message.content:
@startuml
title Tennis Court Booking System

actor users as u1
participant "SystemAdministrator" as sa
actor siteManager as sm

u1 -> sa : 1 bookSite()
activate sa
sa -> sm : 2 deliverUserRequirements()
activate sm
sm <- sm : 3 queryUnoccupiedSite()
deactivate sm
return Unoccupied Site Info 
note right of return Unoccupied Site Info:4 returnUnoccupiedSiteInfo()
end note
alt decidedSite():5 noticeSitelinfo():6 else end alt deactivate sa


@enduml
